duas.title: Ziyarat Imam Mahdi (atfs) (brief)
duas.description: A Brief Ziyaarat:- This brief ziyaarat has been emphasized immensely by our master Imam-e-Zamaan (a.t.f.s.) in a true dream, where he says, ‘Surely I love this ziyaarat.’
duas.arabic:
اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا حُجَّةَ اللهِ عَلَىٰ خَلْقِهِ
اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا نُورَ اللهِ فِي أَرْضِهِ
اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَمِينَ اللهِ عَلَىٰ وَحْيِهِ
اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بَقِيَّةَ اللهِ مِنْ أَوْلِيَائِهِ وَحُجَجِهِ
اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ وَعَلَىٰ آبَائِكَ الطَّاهِرِينَ
اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ وَعَلَىٰ أَصْحَابِكَ وَأَنْصَارِكَ وَأَحْبَابِكَ وَأَشْيَاعِكَ
اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ وَعَلَىٰ مَنْ تُحِبُّ السَّلَامُ عَلَيْهِ
duas.transliteration:
Assalamu ‘alayka ya Hujjatallahi ‘ala khalqihi
Assalamu ‘alayka ya Nurallahi fi ardihi
Assalamu ‘alayka ya Aminallahi ‘ala wahyihi
Assalamu ‘alayka ya Baqiyyatallahi min awliya’ihi wa hujjajihi
Assalamu ‘alayka wa ‘ala aba’ikal-tahirin
Assalamu ‘alayka wa ‘ala as-habika wa ansarika wa ahbabika wa ashyā’ika
Assalamu ‘alayka wa ‘ala man tuhibbus-salamu ‘alayhi
duas.translation:
Peace be upon you, O Proof of Allah over His creation
Peace be upon you, O Light of Allah in His earth
Peace be upon you, O Trustee of Allah over His revelation
Peace be upon you, O Remnant of Allah among His chosen friends and proofs
Peace be upon you and upon your pure forefathers
Peace be upon you and upon your companions, your helpers, your loved ones, and your followers
Peace be upon you, and peace be upon whomever you love for peace to be upon

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا حُجَّةَ اللهِ عَلَىٰ خَلْقِهِ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O Proof of Allah over His creation

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا نُورَ اللهِ فِي أَرْضِهِ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O Light of Allah in His earth

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَمِينَ اللهِ عَلَىٰ وَحْيِهِ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O Trustee of Allah over His revelation

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بَقِيَّةَ اللهِ مِنْ أَوْلِيَائِهِ وَحُجَجِهِ
segments.transliteration: Assalamu ‘alayka ya Baqiyyatallahi min awliya’ihi wa hujjajihi
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O Remnant of Allah among His chosen friends and proofs
Peace be upon you and upon your pure forefathers

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ وَعَلَىٰ أَصْحَابِكَ وَأَنْصَارِكَ وَأَحْبَابِكَ وَأَشْيَاعِكَ
segments.transliteration: Assalamu ‘alayka wa ‘ala as-habika wa ansarika wa ahbabika wa ashyā’ika
segments.translation: Peace be upon you and upon your companions, your helpers, your loved ones, and your followers

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ وَعَلَىٰ مَنْ تُحِبُّ السَّلَامُ عَلَيْهِ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, and peace be upon whomever you love for peace to be upon

duas.reference: Fawz-e-Akbar by Shaykh Faqeeh al-Imaani, p. 711
